ksa_text: Ability to identify, connect, and influence key stakeholders to speed data and AI adoption, mapping stakeholder relationships, building coalitions, and creating influence channels for organizational change.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) acquisition/procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

No GOV-specific signals detected. STRM composite is strong (0.4613).

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Officer (Federal/DoD) whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
